claim_boundary: This evaluation concerns fixed-PVRIG computational independent-dual-receptor Docking geometry only. It is not PVRIG binding probability, affinity or Kd, competition, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or final submission authority.

dual_docking_label_contract.technical_failure_policy: Keep in the Full-QC hard-pass denominator, require blank R_dual_min plus a nonempty reason, never impute, and exclude only from calculable metrics.

frozen_decision_thresholds.applicability: Applied once only after all minimum-denominator gates pass.
frozen_decision_thresholds.fail: FAIL_V4_F96_COMPUTATIONAL_GEOMETRY_SURROGATE if denominator is sufficient and any applicable mandatory gate fails.
frozen_decision_thresholds.insufficient: INSUFFICIENT_TECHNICAL_COVERAGE if any frozen denominator, parent coverage, seed completeness, or bootstrap-validity minimum is not met.
frozen_decision_thresholds.pass: PASS_V4_F96_COMPUTATIONAL_GEOMETRY_SURROGATE only if all applicable mandatory gates pass.

frozen_panel.replacement_policy: No replacement or score-based substitution after Full-QC attrition.

frozen_prediction_gate.ordering: The evaluator must validate and snapshot the frozen prediction receipt, prediction TSV, prediction audit, and panel identity before opening eligibility or Docking-label files.

forbidden_after_unseal: tune weights or thresholds on V4-F Docking labels
prediction_policy.full_qc_attrition: report all Full-QC failures; evaluate the primary endpoint only for the frozen policy-defined Docking set without replacement or score-based substitution
prediction_policy.multiplicity_policy: single preregistered contact-family primary test; base and embedding families are descriptive secondary analyses only
prediction_policy.primary_model_selection: use the contact-stage selected_candidate_model frozen on OPEN_DEVELOPMENT; no post-Docking family switching or ensemble reweighting
prediction_policy.tie_break: candidate_id ascending after exact score and uncertainty ties

frozen_prediction_gate.primary_model: contact only; base and embedding are descriptive frozen alternative families and may never replace contact after unseal.

full_qc_denominator.candidate_and_sequence_hash_join: exact one-to-one against the frozen panel and frozen predictions
full_qc_denominator.definition: Every one of the frozen 96 candidates with full_qc_hard_pass=true; no replacement. Full-QC hard-fail rows remain in attrition reporting but are not Docking-evaluable.

bootstrap.invalid_replicates: omit undefined Spearman replicates and report valid fraction

metric_definitions.mae: Mean absolute error of contact score versus R_dual_min.
metric_definitions.ndcg: linear nonnegative R_dual_min gain with log2 discount, evaluated over all analyzable rows.
metric_definitions.parent_macro: Unweighted mean across defined per-parent metrics; no row-count weighting.
metric_definitions.per_parent: All metrics repeated within parent_framework_cluster when defined.
metric_definitions.primary_overall: Spearman rank correlation between contact_predicted_geometry_score and R_dual_min across analyzable Full-QC hard-pass candidates.
metric_definitions.shortcut_policy: If and only if the frozen prediction table carries a selected model whose name is one of the predeclared shortcut names, compare contact to the strongest such frozen shortcut without selecting or tuning after labels.
metric_definitions.spearman_ties: average ranks; undefined when either vector is constant
metric_definitions.top_quartile_recall_at_exact_20pct_budge: Observed top ceil(0.25*N) by R_dual_min; predicted budget top ceil(0.20*N) by contact score; candidate_id ascending resolves exact ties; report the realized integer budget fraction.
metric_definitions.uncertainty_selective_risk: Remove the ceil(25%*N) highest contact-uncertainty rows and compare retained MAE with overall MAE; also compare highest versus lowest uncertainty quartile MAE.

objective: One-shot prospective evaluation of the frozen contact-family sequence surrogate against continuous independent 8X6B/9E6Y Docking geometry on the V4-F96 panel.

after_unseal_forbidden: change weights, endpoint, thresholds, denominator, bootstrap seed, budget rounding, or missingness handling
select an alternate model from V4-F labels
rerun under the same version after a scientific FAIL
one_shot_and_failure_policy.output_publication: stage outputs then atomically publish receipt last; refuse nonempty or prior-completed output directories
